zh.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾布拉可維爾
zh.Bracewell, York, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾布拉可維爾
zh.lifeSummary: Sir Roger III Tempest是Sir Richard III Tempest的兒子，於大約1222年出生在英國越可爾布拉可維爾。他於大約1250年與Alice Waddington結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於從1287年11月12日到1288年6月在英國越可爾，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾布拉可維爾。

zh-hans.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾布拉可維爾
zh-hans.Bracewell, York, England: 英国英格兰越可爾布拉可維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Roger III Tempest是Sir Richard III Tempest的儿子，于大约1222年出生在英国越可爾布拉可維爾。他于大约1250年与Alice Waddington结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于从1287年11月12日到1288年6月在英国越可爾，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾布拉可維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Tempest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): nickname for someone with a blustery temperament, from Middle English, Old French tempest(e) ‘storm’ (from Latin tempestas ‘weather, season’, a derivative of tempus ‘time’).

variants.name: Tempesta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Raffaele, Agostino, Angelo, Carmelo, Cesare, Cesidio, Dante, Elio, Ezio, Gino.
Italian: nickname for someone with a stormy temperament, from tempesta ‘storm, tempest’ (see Tempest ).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Roger III Tempest was born about 1222, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England as the son of Sir Richard III Tempest. He married Alice Waddington about 1250. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died from 12 November 1287 to June 1288, in Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Roger III Tempest est né environ 1222, à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre, fils de Sir Richard III Tempest. Il a épousé Alice Waddington environ 1250. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé du 12 novembre 1287 au juin 1288, à Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Roger III Tempest wurde um 1222 in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, als Sohn von Sir Richard III Tempest geboren. Er hat um 1250 Alice Waddington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb von 12. November 1287 bis Juni 1288 in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Roger III Tempest è nato il circa 1222 nel Bracewell, Yorkshire, England come figlio di Sir Richard III Tempest. Lui sposato Alice Waddington circa 1250. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì da 12 novembre 1287 a giugno 1288, nel Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolto a Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエル
ja.Bracewell, York, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエル
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger III Tempestは約1222年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルでSir Richard III Tempestの息子として生まれた。約1250年にAlice Waddingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼はから1287年11月12日まで1288年6月にイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger III Tempest(은)는 대략 1222년 영국 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 Sir Richard III Tempest의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1250년 Alice Waddington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1287년 11월 12일부터 1288년 6월 까지 영국 요르크실르에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 브라스웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Roger III Tempest nasceu aproximadamente 1222, em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filho de Sir Richard III Tempest. Ele casou-se com Alice Waddington aproximadamente 1250. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu de 12 de novembro de 1287 a junho de 1288, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Roger III Tempest родился около 1222 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия. Его отца звали Sir Richard III Tempest. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Waddington около 1250 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер с 12 ноября 1287 по июнь 1288 в местности еркшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Roger III Tempest nació aproximadamente 1222, en Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Sir Richard III Tempest. Se casó con Alice Waddington aproximadamente 1250. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió desde 12 de noviembre de 1287 hasta junio de 1288, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
